description: AOE standard ontology catalog (PRD §6.15 / Stream 1 H.5). Each entry can resolve to either a bundled file (`source.kind = "bundled"`, `source.path` resolves under `backend/app/data/ontologies/`) or a remote URL (`source.kind = "url"`, `source.url`). The catalog importer prefers bundled when present and falls back to URL fetch otherwise.

ontologies.name: DCMI Metadata Terms
ontologies.description: Dublin Core Metadata Initiative Terms vocabulary -- the 15 legacy Dublin Core elements plus the most commonly used DCMI Terms. Bundled minimal subset suitable for offline catalog imports.

ontologies.name: FOAF (Friend of a Friend)
ontologies.description: FOAF vocabulary describing people, their activities, and their relations to other people and objects. Common identity-modeling building block.

ontologies.name: SKOS Core
ontologies.description: Simple Knowledge Organization System -- W3C recommendation for representing thesauri, classification schemes, taxonomies, and subject heading systems.

ontologies.name: PROV-O
ontologies.description: W3C PROV Ontology -- represents and exchanges provenance information on the web. Activities, agents, entities, and their relationships.

ontologies.name: OWL-Time
ontologies.description: W3C ontology of temporal concepts -- instants, intervals, durations, temporal relationships. Useful base for any event/time-modeling ontology.

ontologies.name: Schema.org Core
ontologies.description: Schema.org full vocabulary -- structured data markup for web pages. Large vocabulary (~800 classes, ~1500 properties); imported as the full graph then optionally filtered by namespace.

ontologies.name: FIBO Foundations: Agents
ontologies.description: FIBO (Financial Industry Business Ontology) Foundations module modelling agents (people, organizations, autonomous agents) within the financial industry.

ontologies.name: FIBO Foundations: Accounting
ontologies.description: FIBO Foundations accounting equity module -- core concepts for financial accounting.
